_comment: ADD A NEW TEST: append an object below, and add a tests/<id>.json file + an ANSWER_KEYS['<id>'] block in Code.gs. The 'id' MUST equal the filename in tests/ (without .json).

tests.title: CDS Geography — Mock Test 1
tests.subject: Geography
tests.description: Physical & Indian geography — IAU planets, Himalayas, rivers, climate, minerals, ports & PYQs.

tests.title: CDS History — Full PYQ Test
tests.subject: History
tests.description: All 390 CDS History PYQs (CDS 2016-II to 2025-II), topic-wise, with answers and explanations.
